title: SetToList
text: SetToList Specify one or more email addresses of recipients of the email message. SetToList ( ToList ) Parameters Parameter Type Direction Description ToList string In Uniface list of email addresses, with GOLD ; as the separator; maximum of 10240 bytes. Return Values Table 1. Values returned in $status Value Description 0 Operation succeeded -18 Memory allocation error <0 An error occurred Description Explain this code mailApiHandle->SetToList(TO.MESSAGE.NM) Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
